title: Invesco Closed-End Funds Pay Dividends
text: ATLANTA , Sept. 29, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Trustees (the "Board") of each of Invesco High Income Trust II and Invesco Senior Income Trust (each, a "Fund" and collectively, the "Funds") today announces the payment of the following dividends:   EX-DATE 9/14/23 RECORD DATE 9/15/23 REINVEST DATE 9/29/23 PAYABLE DATE 9/29/23 Name of Closed-EndManagement Investment Company   Ticker Dividend Amount Per Share (monthly) Change From Prior Distribution Invesco High Income Trust II VLT $0.09641 - Invesco Senior Income Trust VVR $0.0390 -   Effective August 1, 2018, the Board of Invesco High Income Trust II (NYSE: VLT) approved a Managed Distribution Plan (the "VLT Plan") for the Fund, whereby the Fund increased its monthly dividend to common shareholders to a stated fixed monthly distribution amount based on a distribution rate of 8.5 percent of the closing market price per share as of August 1, 2018, the date the VLT Plan became effective.

title: Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. Announces Quarterly Common Dividend
text: ATLANTA , Sept. 26, 2023  /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. (the "Company") (NYSE: IVR) today announced that its Board of Directors declared a cash dividend of $0.40 per share of common stock for the third quarter of 2023.

title: Should You Consider Invesco (IVZ) for Its Dividend Yield?
text: Amid uncertain macroeconomic conditions, investors may accumulate solid dividend-yielding stocks like Invesco (IVZ) in their portfolios.

title: US government shutdown brings debt problems into focus, which is positive for gold - Invesco's Kristina Hooper
text: (Kitco News) - U.S. 10-year bond yields at fresh 16-year highs as the U.S. dollar near a one-year high continues to keep a lid on the gold market; however, according to one market strategist, the precious metal's downside remains limited as economic uncertainty and rising U.S. debt provide solid support.

title: Invesco's Bank Loan ETF Offers High Yield, Outpaces Active Peers
text: Investing in a bank loan ETF can offer a compelling yield while helping maintain defensive portfolio positioning. In the current environment, investors who want to generate as much yield as possible might look to bank loans instead of high yield bonds.

title: Invesco's (IVZ) August AUM Declines on Unfavorable Markets
text: Invesco (IVZ) records a 2.7% decline in AUM from the prior month in August 2023.

title: Invesco Ltd. Announces August 31, 2023 Assets Under Management
3 Invesco ETFs to Get Apple Exposure
text: There are hundreds of ETFs that hold Apple, giving investors many ways to get exposure to the security. Apple Inc. (AAPL) is set to unveil new products during its annual September event held on Apple's campus on Tuesday, starting at 1pm.

title: Invesco Advisers Announces Portfolio Management Changes for Invesco Closed-End Funds

title: 4 Invesco Energy ETFs Are Rallying on Rising Oil Prices
text: After rising modestly in August, energy commodity prices have continued to advance in September, lifting energy ETFs. Saudi Arabia and Russia on Tuesday announced they would extend voluntary cuts to oil production until the end of the year, prompting a rally in oil prices.

title: 2 Stocks to Watch as the SEC Stalls on Bitcoin ETF Filings (Revised)
text: BlackRock (BLK) and Invesco (IVZ) are two asset managers that are directly affected by the SEC's delay in passing the verdict on Bitcoin ETF applications.

title: Is Bitcoin ETF Launch A Promising Development For Crypto Stocks?
text: Coinbase Global Inc. NASDAQ: COIN pulled back after rocketing nearly 15% higher on August 29 on news that a potential launch of a long-awaited Bitcoin ETF may be getting closer.

title: 3 Stocks to Watch as the SEC Stalls Bitcoin ETF Filings
text: Fidelity (FNF), BlackRock (BLK), and Invesco (IVZ) are three asset managers that are directly affected by the SEC's delay in passing the verdict on Bitcoin ETF applications.

title: This Week in ETFs: Invesco Makes Changes to 35 Funds
text: A total of nine funds launched during the week ending Sept. 1, thus a dip after the 17 ETF launches last week but not unusual in the leadup to a holiday weekend.

title: Invesco High Income Trust II, and Invesco Senior Income Trust Declare Dividends
text: ATLANTA , Sept. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Trustees (the "Board") of each of Invesco High Income Trust II and Invesco Senior Income Trust (each, a "Fund" and collectively, the "Funds") today declared the following dividends: EX-DATE 9/14/23 RECORD DATE 9/15/23 REINVEST DATE 9/29/23 PAYABLE DATE 9/29/23 Name of Closed-EndManagement Investment Company Ticker Monthly DividendAmount Per Share Change FromPrior Distribution Invesco High Income Trust II VLT $0.09641 - Invesco Senior Income Trust VVR $0.0390 - The Board of Trustees (the "Board") of Invesco Senior Income Trust (NYSE: VVR) (the "Fund") approved an increase in the monthly distribution amount payable to common shareholders pursuant to the Fund's Managed Distribution Plan (the "Plan").
